system.notes:
Egg-shaped Orbital Transfer Vehicle (cargo) with wide docking rings; moves cargo between orbital points.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.34): Cargo OTV · 40 · 2 · 1 · Chemical · 10 · Batteries, Fuel Cell or Solar Arrays · 50% · 2(10MU) · 2x30m3 · 1 · 3 · 1-3 · 5 · 3 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 40 million eb; Crew 2; Passengers 1; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 10; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell or Solar Arrays; Sensors 50%; Computers 2 (10MU); Cargo 2 x 30m3; Actions 1; Weapon Spaces 3; Armor (max SP) 1-3; Damage Points 5; Overkill Points 3; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.

needsEyes: sp: book prints Armor '1-3' (variable). Set sp to low bound 1; max supportable 1-3 noted -- confirm.
